title: Circadian rapid eye movement sleep expression is associated with brain microstructural integrity in older adults
author: Schmidt Christina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains processed quantitative MRI images (warped and smooth magnetization transfer saturation, R1 and R2* maps), sleep EEG metrics (REM sleep and sleep efficiency computed during a 40-h multiple nap protocol) and demographics of 86 older individuals. Please refer to the following publication: Circadian rapid eye movement sleep expression is associated with brain microstructural integrity in older adults - Deantoni et al. 2024 doi:10.1038/s42003-024-06415-y
steps_raw: This dataset contains processed quantitative MRI images (warped and smooth magnetization transfer saturation, R1 and R2* maps), sleep EEG metrics (REM sleep and sleep efficiency computed during a 40-h multiple nap protocol) and demographics of 86 older individuals. Please refer to the following publication: Circadian rapid eye movement sleep expression is associated with brain microstructural integrity in older adults - Deantoni et al. 2024 doi:10.1038/s42003-024-06415-y
